meaning: n.伍德斯托克音乐节(每年8月在纽约州东南部Woodstock举行的摇滚音乐节)
examples: I was at the Woodstock festival—that dates me, doesn't it?
A short-term Woodstock in the yard.
It kinda makes me think of what Woodstock must have been like.
And I just read recently that you too were at Woodstock, but you're not in the movie.
An advertisement for Miracle-Ear hearing aids shows a picture of a spaced-out youth, coiffured for Woodstock.
